Waterdeep Street Thug.name: 深水城街头暴徒 Waterdeep Street Thug
Waterdeep Street Thug.description:
生命值 82; 重伤 41先攻 +9
AC 21Fort 19Ref 20Will 17
速度 6
属性力量 16 (+6)
体质 18 (+7)		敏捷 18 (+7)
智力 13 (+4)		感知 14 (+5)
魅力 15 (+5)
语言 Common
阵营 Evil
感官
被动 Perception 15 | Insight 15

装备 dagger , hide armor , morningstar .

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Morningstar</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Weapon</b></p><p>+14 vs AC; 1d10+5 伤害, and target is marked until the end of the thug’s next turn. </p>]] (⚔) 晨星 Morningstar (standard, at-will) ✦ Weapon

标准动作 [[/roll 1d10+5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Morningstar</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Weapon</b></p><p>+14 vs AC; 1d10+5 伤害, and target is marked until the end of the thug’s next turn. </p>]]

+14 vs AC；1d10+5伤害，且目标被标记至暴徒下一回合结束。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Poisoned Dagger</b> (standard, encounter) ✦ <b>Poison, Weapon</b></p><p>Ranged 5/10; +14 vs AC; 1d4+6 伤害, ongoing 5 poison 伤害, and the target grants combat advantage (save ends both). </p>]] ➶ 淬毒匕首 Poisoned Poisoned Dagger (standard, encounter) ✦ Poison, Weapon

标准动作 [[/roll 1d4+6#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Poisoned Dagger</b> (standard, encounter) ✦ <b>Poison, Weapon</b></p><p>Ranged 5/10; +14 vs AC; 1d4+6 伤害, ongoing 5 poison 伤害, and the target grants combat advantage (save ends both). </p>]]

远程 5/10

+14 vs AC；1d4+6伤害，持续5点毒素伤害，且目标给予战斗优势（豁免终止两者）。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Rattling Smash</b> (standard, encounter) ✦ <b>Fear, Weapon</b></p><p>+12 vs Will; 2d10+8 伤害, and the target takes a –2 penalty to attack rolls until the end of its next turn. If the target was marked by the tough, the target is also dazed until the end of the tough’s next turn. </p>]] ⚔ 震吓猛击 Rattling Rattling Smash (standard, encounter) ✦ Fear, Weapon

标准动作 [[/roll 2d10+8#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Rattling Smash</b> (standard, encounter) ✦ <b>Fear, Weapon</b></p><p>+12 vs Will; 2d10+8 伤害, and the target takes a –2 penalty to attack rolls until the end of its next turn. If the target was marked by the tough, the target is also dazed until the end of the tough’s next turn. </p>]]

+12 vs 意志；2d10+8伤害，且目标在下一回合结束前攻击检定承受-2减值。若目标被暴徒标记，则目标在暴徒下一回合结束前陷入晕眩。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Fanged Troll.name: 尖牙巨魔 Fanged Troll
Fanged Troll.description:
生命值 109; 重伤 54
Regeneration 10
Vulnerable acid or fire (if the fanged troll takes acid or fire 伤害, its regeneration does not function until the end of its next turn) 		先攻 +9
AC 26Fort 24Ref 20Will 18
速度 8
属性力量 22 (+11)
体质 21 (+10)		敏捷 15 (+7)
智力 9 (+4)		感知 10 (+5)
魅力 8 (+4)
语言 Giant
阵营 Chaotic Evil
技能 Athletics +16, Endurance +15感官
被动 Perception 15 | Insight 15

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>Reach 2; +17 vs AC; 2d8+4 伤害, and the target is grabbed. </p>]] (⚔) 利爪 Claw (standard, at-will)

随意 [[/roll 2d8+4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>Reach 2; +17 vs AC; 2d8+4 伤害, and the target is grabbed. </p>]]

标准动作 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Gnaw</b> (standard; usable only against a grabbed target, at-will) </p><p>+17 vs AC; 2d8+4 伤害 and ongoing 5 伤害 （豁免终止）. </p>]]

触及 2 [[/roll 2d8+4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Gnaw</b> (standard; usable only against a grabbed target, at-will) </p><p>+17 vs AC; 2d8+4 伤害 and ongoing 5 伤害 （豁免终止）. </p>]]

+17 vs AC；2d8+4伤害，且目标被擒抱。

-

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Threatening Reach</b></p><p>The fanged troll can make opportunity attacks against all enemies within its reach (2 squares)</p>]] 威胁触及 Threatening Threatening Reach

尖牙巨魔可以对其触及范围（2格）内的所有敌人进行借机攻击。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Troll Healing</b>✦ <b>Healing</b></p><p>If the fanged troll is reduced to 0 hit points by an attack that does not deal acid or fire 伤害, it falls prone and remains at 0 hit points until the start of its next turn, when it regains 10 hit points. If an attack deals acid or fire 伤害 to the fanged troll while it is at 0 hit points, it is destroyed.</p>]] 巨魔治愈 Troll Troll Healing✦ Healing

如果尖牙巨魔被一次不造成强酸或火焰伤害的攻击降至0生命值，它倒地并保持0生命值直到其下一回合开始，届时它恢复10生命值。如果在尖牙巨魔处于0生命值时，有攻击对其造成强酸或火焰伤害，则它被摧毁。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Regeneration 10.name: 再生10 Regeneration 10
Regeneration 10.description:
再生10 Regeneration 10

特性

如果尖牙巨魔受到强酸或火焰伤害，其再生能力直到其下一回合结束前无法生效。

如果尖牙巨魔被一次不造成强酸或火焰伤害的攻击降至0生命值，它倒地并保持0生命值直到其下一回合开始，届时它恢复10生命值。如果在尖牙巨魔处于0生命值时，有攻击对其造成强酸或火焰伤害，则它被摧毁。

装备 chainmail , spiked chain .

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Spiked Chain</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Weapon</b></p><p>Reach 2; +19 vs AC; 4d4+5 伤害. </p>]] (⚔) 钉链 Spiked Spiked Chain (standard, at-will) ✦ Weapon

触及 2 [[/roll 4d4+5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Spiked Chain</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Weapon</b></p><p>Reach 2; +19 vs AC; 4d4+5 伤害. </p>]]

+19 vs AC；4d4+5伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Chain of Destruction</b> (standard; usable only while bloodied; requires a spiked chain, at-will) ✦ <b>Lightning, Thunder, Weapon</b></p><p>Reach 2; +19 vs AC; 4d4+5 伤害, and the target takes ongoing 5 lightning and thunder 伤害. </p>]]

[[/roll 4d4+5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Chain of Destruction</b> (standard; usable only while bloodied; requires a spiked chain, at-will) ✦ <b>Lightning, Thunder, Weapon</b></p><p>Reach 2; +19 vs AC; 4d4+5 伤害, and the target takes ongoing 5 lightning and thunder 伤害. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Burning Acid Bolt</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Acid, Fire</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +19 vs AC; 2d10+4 acid and fire 伤害, and the target is slowed （豁免终止）. </p>]]

[[/roll 2d10+4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Burning Acid Bolt</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Acid, Fire</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +19 vs AC; 2d10+4 acid and fire 伤害, and the target is slowed （豁免终止）. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Scream of the Chained God</b> (standard, recharge ⚅</p><p>Close blast 5; targets enemies; +18 vs Will; 1d10+5 psychic 伤害, and the target is dazed （豁免终止）. </p>]]

[[/roll 1d10+5#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Scream of the Chained God</b> (standard, recharge ⚅</p><p>Close blast 5; targets enemies; +18 vs Will; 1d10+5 psychic 伤害, and the target is dazed （豁免终止）. </p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Darkfire</b> (minor, encounter) </p><p>Ranged 10; +18 vs Reflex; until the end of the elemental eye priest’s next turn, the target grants combat advantage to all attackers, and the target cannot benefit from invisibility or concealment. </p>]] ➶ 暗火 Darkfire (minor, encounter)

远程 10

+18 vs Reflex；直到元素之眼祭司的下一个回合结束，目标对所有攻击者提供战斗优势，并且目标不能从隐形或隐蔽中获益。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Chains of the Master</b> (minor; at-will) </p><p>The elemental eye priest transfers one effect that a save can end from itself to an ally within 5 squares of it.</p>]] 主人的锁链 Chains of the Chains of the Master (minor; at-will)

次要

元素之眼祭司将一个豁免可终止的效果从自身转移至5格内的一个盟友。
